title: Are there alternate translations of the TV series
display_title: Are there alternate translations of the TV series
wikitext:
[]: Are there alternate translations of the TV series?             Quote Post by Tobuway25 » Sat Aug 28, 2010 11:49 pm I've heard a lot of talk about how ADV films screwed up the translation of the series. Is there a better version out there? Like a fan-sub or something? If so where can I find it?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Aug 29, 2010 12:10 am There is the dub (obviously) as well as the original subtitles, which were on the original VHS and "Prefect Collection" DVDs. And then there were the improved subtitles on Platinum. The only other full-series translation that I'm really familiar with is the Literal Translation Project: http://wiki.evageeks.org/Literal_Translation_Project

[]:             Quote Post by Tobuway25 » Sun Aug 29, 2010 12:24 am So the platinum collection subtitles are pretty good? Thank you!

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Aug 29, 2010 11:14 am Tobuway25 wrote: So the platinum collection subtitles are pretty good? Thank you!

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sun Aug 29, 2010 11:32 am There's also the A2000A version of Renewal, which was translated by native Japanese speakers; it tends to be a bit more literal:

[]:             Quote Post by Tobuway25 » Wed Sep 01, 2010 4:51 am Thank you Shin-seiki I'll check this out.

[]: Are there alternate translations of the TV series?             Quote Post by Tobuway25 » Sat Aug 28, 2010 11:49 pm I've heard a lot of talk about how ADV films screwed up the translation of the series. Is there a better version out there? Like a fan-sub or something? If so where can I find it?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Aug 29, 2010 12:10 am There is the dub (obviously) as well as the original subtitles, which were on the original VHS and "Prefect Collection" DVDs. And then there were the improved subtitles on Platinum. The only other full-series translation that I'm really familiar with is the Literal Translation Project: http://wiki.evageeks.org/Literal_Translation_Project

[]:             Quote Post by Tobuway25 » Sun Aug 29, 2010 12:24 am So the platinum collection subtitles are pretty good? Thank you!
